title: Marketplace Manager - Zomato - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Zomato - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zomato family as a Marketplace Manager in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!
